OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Davina Smith IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
